tops.purpose: Upper-body apparel listings and merchandising assets.
actions: Normalize to catalog SKU
Validate size and color variants on PDP feeds

bottoms.purpose: Pants, shorts, and lower-body products for storefront taxonomy.
actions: Check inseam / length attributes when present
Map to bottoms navigation

dresses.purpose: One-piece garments; often high visual variance (formal vs casual).
actions: Tag occasion and length when possible
Separate kids vs adult if mixed

outerwear.purpose: Jackets and coats; seasonal and higher ticket.
actions: Capture insulation or waterproof flags from labels
Watch for brand logo conflicts

shoes.purpose: Footwear with strong size and width requirements.
actions: Require size scale (US/EU) before auto-publish
Flag mismatched left/right pairs

accessories.purpose: Jewelry, watches, and small goods; detail shots dominate.
actions: Enforce material disclosures where regulated
Deduplicate near-identical angles

bags.purpose: Handbags and luggage; dimension and capacity matter for shipping.
actions: Attach volume or linear dimensions when on label
Route counterfeit-risk hits to review

product_on_model.purpose: Lifestyle imagery for conversion; cropping affects attribute visibility.
actions: Keep paired flat-lay when available for attribute OCR
Respect brand guidelines on model shots

product_flat.purpose: Clean catalog masters; best source for color and SKU extraction.
actions: Prefer for auto-tagging pipelines
Validate background removal artifacts

packaging.purpose: Shipping cartons and labels; ties to fulfillment and compliance.
actions: Read barcode or ASN when possible
Separate inbound vs outbound packaging

documents.purpose: Invoices, receipts, and order paperwork; financial and support relevance.
actions: Extract order ID and totals for reconciliation
Redact payment details in customer-visible exports
